title: In all probability, you will get relief: Supreme Court to Delhi riots accused Tasleem Ahmed, Khalid Saifi
description: The Supreme Court on Friday hinted that it may grant bail to Tasleem Ahmed and Khalid Saifi, both accused in the 2020 Delhi Riots conspiracy case.A Bench of Justices Aravind Kumar and PB Varale reserved its verdict in the matter today."In all probability, you will get relief," said the Court, while addressing a counsel for the accused. Justice Aravind Kumar and Justice PB VaraleDuring the hearing, the Delhi Police's counsel, Additional Solicitor General (ASG) SV Raju said that the accused may be
